title: Search for a Range
hints: Use binary search twice - once to find the leftmost occurrence, once to find the rightmost occurrence.
For leftmost index: when A[mid] == B, update the result and continue searching left (hi = mid - 1).
For rightmost index: when A[mid] == B, update the result and continue searching right (lo = mid + 1).
If the target is not found in the first search, return [-1, -1] immediately.
The time complexity should be O(log n) for both searches.
